decks.notes: This Aggro-Burn deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent using low-cost spells such as Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, along with creatures like Kessig Flamebreather and Voldaren Epicure. The strategy includes using faithless looting to dig for key cards and generating value with Guttersnipe triggering off of spell casts. Fireblast provides a powerful finisher while Grab the Prize helps maintain card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure while burning the opponent down for a swift victory.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of small, aggressive creatures in the form of Weenie White cards. It includes cards like Kor Skyfisher, Leonardo, Big Brother, and Lunarch Veteran to quickly build a board presence. The deck also includes support cards like Prismatic Strands and Guardians' Pledge to protect and boost the creatures. With a low mana curve and efficient creatures, this deck aims to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total and win the game before they can mount a defense.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Balustrade Spy combo to mill your entire library into the graveyard and use Dread Return to reanimate Lotleth Giant for lethal damage. The deck focuses on ramping mana with cards like Overgrown Battlement and Saruli Caretaker, while also including cards like Winding Way and Lead the Stampede to dig for combo pieces. Additionally, there are utility creatures like Masked Vandal and Mesmeric Fiend to disrupt the opponent's game plan. This deck aims to win quickly through its combo while also having tools to handle different types of threats.

The main concept of this deck is to control the board through removal spells like Cast Down and Defile while generating value with cards like Ichor Wellspring and Khalni Garden. The deck also aims to disrupt the opponent's graveyard with cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Bojuka Bog. Additionally, it includes finishers like Crypt Rats and Troll of Khazad-dûm to close out the game. The deck also utilizes sacrifice effects with cards like Fanatical Offering and Lembas to gain additional advantage.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence by playing low-cost creatures with hexproof and then buffing them with powerful auras. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of evasion, protection, and massive power boosts from cards like Ethereal Armor, Armadillo Cloak, and Ancestral Mask. By enchanting your creatures and making them difficult to target or block, you can quickly take control of the game and deal massive damage to your opponent.

The main goal of this Gruul Aggro deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Utopia Sprawl and Arbor Elf, allowing for early aggressive plays. Writhing Chrysalis and Malevolent Rumble help control the board while Eldrazi Repurposer and Annoyed Altisaur provide solid threats. Generous Ent boosts the team's power and toughness, while Avenging Hunter offers additional pressure. By utilizing efficient mana ramp and powerful creatures, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggression and control, ultimately securing victory through quick and decisive attacks.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent by playing aggressive creatures and burn spells. By continuously attacking with Sneaky Snackers and Guttersnipes, as well as using spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the goal is to reduce the opponent's life total to zero as fast as possible. The deck also includes cards like Grab the Prize to maintain card advantage and Faithless Looting to filter through the deck. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures and burn spells to secure a quick victory.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly play aggressive creatures and burn spells to deal direct damage to the opponent's life total, aiming to win the game as fast as possible. By using efficient low-cost cards like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart alongside creatures like Kessig Flamebreather and Voldaren Epicure, the deck can apply early pressure and finish off the opponent with cards like Fireblast and Guttersnipe. This deck's strategy revolves around dealing damage quickly and efficiently to secure victory in a Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage. The focus is on quickly building a board presence and maintaining pressure on the opponent to force them to react defensively. By utilizing efficient creatures like Goblin Bushwhacker and Burning-Tree Emissary, combined with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast, the deck aims to win the game before the opponent can set up their own strategy. With a streamlined game plan and focus on early aggression, this deck aims to secure victory swiftly.

The main focus of this deck is to apply pressure through aggressive creature plays while disrupting the opponent's game plan with removal spells and card draw. By utilizing a combination of low-cost creatures, value engines like Ichor Wellspring and Writhing Chrysalis, and efficient removal options such as Cast Down and Krark-Clan Shaman, the deck aims to control the board and overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of threats. The inclusion of cards like Cleansing Wildfire and Pulse of Murasa also provide additional utility and flexibility in dealing with various matchups.

This Jund Aggro deck focuses on sacrificing artifacts and creatures to generate value and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By using cards like Refurbished Familiar and Fanatical Offering, the deck can constantly bring back threats and trigger abilities. The deck also takes advantage of land destruction with cards like Cleansing Wildfire and Twisted Landscape to slow down the opponent. By utilizing a mix of removal, sacrifice effects, and land disruption, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption.

The deck revolves around using artifacts and sacrificing them to deal damage to the opponent efficiently. It features cards that synergize with artifacts, like Refurbished Familiar and Ichor Wellspring, along with cards that can be sacrificed for value, such as Nihil Spellbomb. The deck also includes various bridges and utility lands to support the artifact theme. The goal is to quickly establish a board presence with cheap artifacts and finish off the opponent with direct damage from cards like Galvanic Blast. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient use of resources.

This deck focuses on flooding the board with low-cost white creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By utilizing cards like Thraben Inspector and Kor Skyfisher to generate value and maintain card advantage, it aims to maintain a constant pressure on the opponent. Additionally, cards like Battle Screech and Guardians' Pledge provide the deck with the ability to go wide and go all in for a final push. The deck's strategy revolves around building a wide board presence and utilizing synergies between its creatures to close out the game swiftly.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by ramping up mana with Urza's Tower, Mine, and Power Plant, allowing for powerful plays with large creatures like Maelstrom Colossus and Boulderbranch Golem. The deck also utilizes cards like Candy Trail and Pinnacle Kill-Ship for additional control elements. With the help of cards like Prophetic Prism and Ancient Stirrings for card advantage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats while disrupting their game plan with cards like Relic of Progenitus.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly flood the board with low-cost Elf creatures and use cards like Timberwatch Elf and Avenging Hunter to buff them up and swing for massive damage. Generating mana with Priest of Titania and Elvish Mystic allows for explosive turns and overwhelming board presence. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help to refill your hand with more Elves, while cards like Masked Vandal provide utility and disruption. The goal is to establish a fast and aggressive board state, overwhelming your opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive elf creatures, while using cards like Lead the Stampede and Winding Way to quickly refill your hand with more elves. Cards like Priest of Titania and Timberwatch Elf provide mana ramp and powerful buffs to your creatures. The goal is to build a strong presence on the board early, while maintaining card advantage and increasing the power of your creatures to swiftly defeat your opponent.
